name: alim-c3-skills
description: Personal skill marketplace for Alireza Rezvani — 12 skill packs covering executive advisory, engineering, marketing, product, finance, project management, regulatory/QM, and more.

plugins.name: business-growth
plugins.description: 4 business growth agent skills: customer success (health scoring, churn), sales engineer (RFP), revenue operations (pipeline, GTM), contract & proposal writer.

plugins.name: c-level-advisor
plugins.description: 10 C-level advisory skills: CEO, CTO, COO, CPO, CMO, CFO, CRO, CISO, CHRO, Executive Mentor. Multi-role board meetings, strategy routing, structured recommendations.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: 25 advanced engineering skills: agent design, RAG, MCP servers, CI/CD, database design, observability, security auditing, release management, platform ops.

plugins.name: engineering-team
plugins.description: 23 engineering team skills: architecture, frontend, backend, QA, DevOps, security, AI/ML, data engineering, Playwright, Stripe, AWS, MS365.

plugins.name: enhance-prompt
plugins.description: Transforms vague UI ideas into polished, Stitch-optimized prompts with UI/UX keywords and design system context.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Financial analyst skill: ratio analysis, DCF valuation, budget variance, rolling forecasts.

plugins.name: marketing-skill
plugins.description: 42 marketing skills across 7 pods: content, SEO, CRO, channels, growth, intelligence, sales. Foundation context + orchestration router.

plugins.name: product-team
plugins.description: 10 product skills: PM toolkit (RICE), agile PO, product strategist (OKR), UX researcher, UI design system, competitive teardown, landing page generator, SaaS scaffolder.

plugins.name: project-management
plugins.description: 6 project management skills: senior PM, scrum master, Jira expert (JQL), Confluence expert, Atlassian admin, template creator.

plugins.name: ra-qm-team
plugins.description: 12 regulatory & QM skills: ISO 13485 QMS, MDR 2017/745, FDA 510(k)/PMA, ISO 27001 ISMS, GDPR/DSGVO, risk management (ISO 14971), CAPA, auditing.

plugins.name: react-components
plugins.description: Converts Stitch designs into modular Vite and React components using system-level networking and AST-based validation.

plugins.name: stitch-loop
plugins.description: Teaches agents to iteratively build websites using Stitch with an autonomous baton-passing loop pattern.
